form.formComment: Most recently eased back early on 6th of 12 at this track Rtg 68+ on March 19 over 2100m, slow going 5.5 len behind Deadly And Fast carrying 57kg at $9. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 3rd of 11 at York on April 6 over 1500m, long-neck behind Tosen Impact with 56kg at $26. Previously second-up second last of 13 at Morphettville Parks 4yo+ Bm64 on September 6 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Alainge with 60.5kg at $101. Strong fresh effort and he's sure to have come on from that effort.

form.formComment: Last start scored a big 4 len win at this track Cl2 April 5 over 1900m in soft going defeating Bella Violetta carrying 56kg at $11. The start before that 4th of 12 at this track Cl2 on March 26 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Gingers Sister carrying 57.5kg at $17. Far too good last start and it's hard to see anything turning the tables on him.
